And then for the researcher, so what the research step does is it will take the title of the article, the direction that we gave the article, and then it will create a list of questions that it needs to answer in order to create a very comprehensive research document that it's going to use to generate an article.
LLMs have a problem with generating high-quality content when they don't have enough information.

in different frameworks.

Following like the rough outline that we gave it, but we will also like add internal links, add source links.
